name: copia_hotspot_chr2L_25C
description: Drosophila TE insertion hotspot: copia LTR-retrotransposon insertion-rich block near 25C; copia is the most abundant LTR-TE in D. melanogaster (~30 copies/genome). Drosophila genomes carry ~15-20% TE content. Insertion hotspots reflect both target-site preference and lower selection in low-recombination regions. Reads hitting these regions are typically misplaced unless full-length insertion-specific anchors are available.
expected_copy_count: 10-100 copies of the named TE family genome-wide; locally enriched 3-10x baseline
